name: ownware-code
description: Ownware Code — full-stack coding agent. Reads, writes, edits, searches, and executes.

avatar.symbol: <path d="M22 22 L12 32 L22 42" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none"/><path d="M42 22 L52 32 L42 42" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none"/><line x1="36" y1="20" x2="28" y2="44" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-opacity="0.55"/>

subagents.name: explore
subagents.description: Fast read-only codebase search. Use for finding files, patterns, architecture. Runs on Haiku for speed.

subagents.name: planner
subagents.description: Software architect. Explores codebase and designs step-by-step implementation plans. Read-only.

subagents.name: verifier
subagents.description: Adversarial tester. Runs builds, tests, linters. Finds edge cases and failures before reporting done.

subagents.name: general
subagents.description: General-purpose read+edit helper. Use for self-contained subtasks that don't fit explore (read-only) / planner (design) / verifier (test). Returns a concise report.
